evaluation_design.population_definition: The same 22 predeclared detector cases from the v1.12.0 field-validation cohort, re-evaluated with Citable v1.13.0 after resource-applicability remediation.
evaluation_design.selection_method: Paired re-evaluation of every previously disclosed case against fresh owner-authorized URL audits from clean release-preparation commit 709c8e81a14cdaf3d68bc9191b281b9c70bd88ea.
inclusion_criteria: Every critical or high finding emitted by the selected acceptance run for each property.
Four deterministic negative-control cases on an observed HTTP 200 HTML homepage.
exclusion_criteria: No additional medium or low findings were adjudicated.
Semantic findings remain excluded because two independent reviewers were not available.
Sitemap URLs beyond the unchanged 50-page crawl ceiling remain outside adjudication.
extrapolation_limits: Metrics apply only to these paired cases, properties, Citable v1.13.0, and the disclosed collection window.
Absence of the 17 prior false-positive detector/subject pairs does not estimate detector accuracy outside this cohort.
Owner collection and adjudication are not independent validation.

detector_precision.population: Adjudicated detector cases with detected outcomes.
confidence_limitations: Precision applies only to the disclosed expected-case population.

discovered_false_negative_rate.population: Adjudicated cases expected to produce a detection.
confidence_limitations: Unknown false negatives are not quantified; this paired cohort evaluates only the 22 previously disclosed cases.
The unchanged 50-page crawl ceiling left sitemap coverage incomplete on aisyndicate.io and mikeholownych.com.

false_positive_rate.population: Adjudicated cases expected not to produce a detection.
confidence_limitations: Rate applies only to represented non-detection cases.

reviewer_exact_agreement.population: Semantic reviews with at least two verdicts.
exclusions: Reviews with fewer than two verdicts.
confidence_limitations: Exact agreement does not establish reviewer correctness.

adjudication_rate.population: Semantic reviews with at least two verdicts.
exclusions: Reviews with fewer than two verdicts.
confidence_limitations: Adjudication rate describes workflow, not semantic accuracy.
Runtime depends on disclosed execution environments.
Nearest-rank p95 is unstable for small populations.
Peak memory is the maximum owner-reported execution value.
Storage excludes unavailable or undisclosed evidence.
Reproducibility is bounded by each run receipt and declared exclusions.
Incomplete status depends on declared unavailable evidence.

remediation_verification_success.population: Remediation verifications with a completed verdict.
confidence_limitations: Verification does not establish external outcome causation.

unknown_false_negatives.reason: Cases absent from the disclosed and adjudicated expected-detection population cannot be counted.

false_negative_discovery_limitations: Unknown false negatives are not quantified; this paired cohort evaluates only the 22 previously disclosed cases.
The unchanged 50-page crawl ceiling left sitemap coverage incomplete on aisyndicate.io and mikeholownych.com.
causal_limitations: The paired result verifies detector-behavior remediation for the disclosed cases; it establishes no causal effect on search, citation, traffic, or conversion outcomes.
limitations: All collection and adjudication are owner-controlled and are not independent attestation.
Reproducibility was not claimed because the final clean-SHA cohort was collected once per property.
TECH-011 on aisyndicate.io remains incomplete until raw and rendered content are compared and reviewed.
The historical v1.12.0 corpus remains immutable; this is a separate post-remediation cohort.
